name: stockyard-usagepulse
description: Per-user and per-feature token metering. Multi-dimensional tracking, spend caps, and billing export in CSV/JSON.

tools.name: usagepulse_usage
tools.description: Get usage breakdown by dimension (user, feature, team).

tools.name: usagepulse_user_usage
tools.description: Get usage for a specific user.

tools.name: usagepulse_set_cap
tools.description: Set a spending cap for a user or team.

tools.name: usagepulse_export
tools.description: Export usage data as CSV or JSON for billing.

tools.name: usagepulse_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the UsagePulse proxy is running and healthy.
